tables.name: messages
tables.label: Messages
tables.description: One row per chat message: who sent it, the original text, its translation, and the sender's language.

tables.name: participants
tables.label: Participants
tables.description: One row per person in the room (keyed by their device id): the language they read and write in. Synced so each device knows what language to translate the other person's messages into.
